name: OpenFileDialog
summary: Similar to the System.Windows.Forms.OpenFileDialog, but with customized Rhino user interface.

constructors.name: OpenFileDialog
constructors.summary: Create a new open file dialog.

methods.name: ShowOpenDialog
methods.summary: Show the actual dialog to allow the user to select a file.

returns.doc: true if a file was selected. false if the dialog was canceled

properties.name: DefaultExt
properties.summary: The default file name extension. The returned string does not include the period.

properties.name: FileName
properties.summary: Gets or sets a string containing the file name selected in the file dialog box.

properties.name: FileNames
properties.summary: Gets the names of all of the selected files in the dialog box

properties.name: Filter
properties.summary: Gets or sets the current file name filter string, which determines the choices that appear in the "Save as file type" or "Files of type" box in the dialog box. See System.Windows.Forms.FileDialog for details.

properties.name: InitialDirectory
properties.summary: Gets or sets the initial directory displayed by the file dialog box.

properties.name: MultiSelect
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the dialog box allows multiple files to be selected

properties.name: Title
properties.summary: Gets or sets the file dialog box title.
